label: AppleScript • scripted JSON-looking literal survives verbatim
query: Set the body of the note 'Payload' to the provided content, exactly.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the fidelity edge: a literal whose VALUE looks like JSON (a brace object with a bare number) must be inserted character-for-character, never re-parsed into a native object. Proves the {{content}} path preserves JSON-looking content byte-for-byte through expansion + un-escape. No tokens.
